proline oxidation to pyroglutamic acid/Tryptophan oxidation to oxolactone/aldehyde and ketone modifications
Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K
Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Cleavage product of EGS protein crosslinks by hydroylamine treatment/Addition of D
Homoserine lactone/Prompt loss of side chain from oxidised Met

project.title: Barley newly synthesized ribosomal proteome: E.coli control samples
project.projectDescription: Ribosomal proteome profiling control for project: Plants synthesize new ribosomal proteins and recycle others in cold-acclimated ribosomes and these in turn synthesize a differential proteome in barley root meristems.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Sucrose cushion validation of purchased 70S E.coli ribosomal complexes, recovery of all protein components from the complexes followed by SP3-mediated protein binding, processing and digestion into peptides. Peptides were monitored in a LC-MS/MS array.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MaxQuant protein search followed by R interactive analyses of the resulting abundances

submitters.affiliation: Max Planck Institute of Molecular Plant Physiology and The University of Melbourne

quantificationMethods.name: MS1 intensity based label-free quantification method

references.referenceLine: Gentry-Torfer D, Murillo E, Barrington CL, Nie S, Leeming MG, Suwanchaikasem P, Williamson NA, Roessner U, Boughton BA, Kopka J, Martinez-Seidel F. Streamlining Protein Fractional Synthesis Rates Using SP3 Beads and Stable Isotope Mass Spectrometry: A Case Study on the Plant Ribosome. Bio Protoc. 2024 14(9):e4981

Characteristics[OrganismPart]: Apical root meristems of germinating seedlings
Characteristics[SpikedCompound]: Escherichia coli 70S ribosomes (New England BioLabs, catalog number: P0763S); one tube of 1 mg is enough as internal standard for the protocol detailed below
Comment[Instrument]: Orbitrap mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, model: Eclipse) equipped with a nanoflow HPLC (Ultimate 3000 RSLC, Dionex)
Comment[IonizationType]: nano electrospray ionization (ESI) source at positive mode
Comment[GradientTime]: solvent B 3%–23% in 59 min, 23%–40% in 10 min, 40%–80% in 5 min, which was maintained at 80% for 5 min before dropping to 3% in 0.1 min with subsequent equilibration at 3% solvent B for 9.9 min
